title: humboltia bilamellata
intro: Humboltia bilamellata, also known as the twin-crested Humboldtia, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats in India and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections, and has been traditionally used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Humboltia bilamellata can be prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
